expectedAnswers: Yes, I'll be there! Thanks for inviting me.
Absolutely! I'm already looking forward to it — see you at 8pm on Maple St!
Definitely! I’ve got it marked on my calendar — can’t wait!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认出席，无模糊表达
语言准确性：语法正确，时态使用恰当
表达自然度：使用口语化表达，语气积极
关键词覆盖：包含时间、地点或感谢语

content.speakerText: Awesome! See you Saturday then — don't be late!
content.speakerTextCn: 太棒了！周六见啊，别迟到！
expectedAnswers: Haha, I'll be there early with snacks!
No chance I'll be late — thanks for having me!
Got it! I’ll set a reminder — see you Saturday!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应提醒并承诺准时
语言准确性：使用恰当的否定结构（no chance, won't）
表达自然度：语气轻松，符合朋友间对话风格
关键词覆盖：包含感谢、时间或幽默元素

content.speakerText: Thanks for the invitation — I had a wonderful time!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你邀请我，我玩得很开心！
expectedAnswers: You're so welcome! I'm glad you enjoyed it — take care!
It was my pleasure! Let’s do this again soon!
Thank you for saying that — I hope to see you again soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：礼貌回应感谢并表达积极期待
语言准确性：使用恰当的感谢回应句型
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合社交结束语境
关键词覆盖：包含感谢回应、未来期待或告别语
